creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 240122
"git diff" patch to update the port

- Update 1.61 --> 1.62 (bugfix release)
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/JONASBN/Workflow-1.62/source/Changes.md

- "portlint -AC" warns about pkg-descr of less than 2 lines.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.1-RELEASE-p6
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.4
pkg 1.19.0
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1o
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
